name: Chocolate Pudding Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 3.9 oz package instant chocolate pudding mix
whipped cream or ice cream -- optional
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the first six ingredients.
2. Beat on medium speed for 2 minutes.
3. Stir in chocolate chips.
4. Pour into a 5-quart slow cooker that has been coated with cooking spray.
5. Cover and cook on LOW for 6-7 hours or until a toothpick inserted near the center comes out with moist crumbs.
6. Serve in bowls with whipped cream or ice cream if desired.
